name: VANTA OS
tagline: The Operating System for Your Shopify Store
description:
VANTA OS is an autonomous AI commerce operating system that manages your Shopify store for you. Tell it what you want — 'Find winning products,' 'Optimize my SEO,' 'Restock low inventory' — and VANTA plans, executes, and monitors every action with full transparency, undo, and human approval gates.

Key features:
• Natural language command interface (English, Arabic, French)
• 7 specialized AI agents running 24/7 (Inventory, Pricing, SEO, Marketing, Fraud, Trends, A/B Testing)
• Multi-step goal execution with self-healing workflows
• One-click undo for every action
• Blast-radius checks before bulk operations
• Predictive demand forecasting
• Competitor price intelligence
• Long-term semantic memory (RAG)
• Full audit trail for every decision
• Kill switch for emergency shutdown
• WCAG 2.1 AA accessible
• Dark/light theme synced with Shopify Admin
• MCP Server — connect ChatGPT/Claude to your store

pricing.description: 100 AI credits per month. Perfect for evaluation.
1,000 AI credits. Full agent suite, predictive analytics, Guardian Mode.
10,000 AI credits. Autonomous commerce mode, browser agent, multi-agent orchestration.

features: Full audit trail and decision history
MCP Server for external AI assistant integration
